ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain name of the website */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the website */,
  "population_served" INTEGER /* Estimated population served by the website */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Current visibility of the website (e.g., 99.6%) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the website was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the website's data */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the website (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the website */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the website belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being ranked */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Current rank of the website (e.g., #1) */,
  "average_position" REAL /* Average position of the website in search engine results */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages on the website */,
  "rankings" INTEGER /* Number of rankings for the website */,
  "zips" INTEGER /* Number of ZIP codes covered by the website */,
  "top1" INTEGER /* Number of top 1 rankings for the website */,
  "top3" INTEGER /* Number of top 3 rankings for the website */,
  "top10" INTEGER /* Number of top 10 rankings for the website */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was recorded */,
  "search_engine" TEXT /* Name of the search engine (e.g., Google, Bing) */,
  "query" TEXT /* Search query for which the ranking was recorded */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions the website received */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the website received */,
  "ctr" REAL /* Click-through rate (CTR) of the website */,
  "traffic_source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic (e.g., organic, paid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for client login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the client account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the client's data */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the client's company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the client (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, client, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the user belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., e-commerce, blog) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the traffic was recorded */,
  "visitors" INTEGER /* Number of visitors to the website */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate of the website */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average session duration */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the traffic (e.g., organic, paid, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement entry */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the engagement was recorded */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "engagements" INTEGER /* Number of engagements (e.g., likes, shares, comments) */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Reach of the content */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_engagement_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)
